response.global_analysis:
1. Dialogue Match: The streamer's vocalizations and the surrounding background voices of other VTubers are transcribed accurately. No commercial music is present, so the reference JSON's absence of song data is correct.
2. Translation Approach: Japanese honorifics, gaming terms (like zako, tako, suika), and playful slang ('de yansu') are preserved with natural contextual translations.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to matches vocal activity, using truncation to separate rapid speech blocks and handle dialogue overlaps.

subtitles.original: マッカンにおち疲れでやんす...
subtitles.english: I'm exhausted from Maccan's... de yansu.

subtitles.original: あっという間だ。スイカ今日いっぱい稼げた？
subtitles.english: That was fast. Did you make a lot of money from watermelons today?

subtitles.original: ...が結構、一回で割と100万くらい行けるから、頑張れば。
subtitles.english: ...because you can pretty much get 1 million in one go if you work hard.

subtitles.original: その手に持っているのは...
subtitles.english: What you have in your hand...

subtitles.original: みんなスイカ人。やばい。
subtitles.english: Everyone is a watermelon person. Oh dear.

subtitles.original: シナジー指数マックスだったぞ。
subtitles.english: My synergy status was at max.

subtitles.original: ただ、プラスの方は雑魚だから、その...
subtitles.english: But the plus side is weak, so...

subtitles.original: いっぱい置いちゃっていけないね。一個ずつじゃないと。
subtitles.english: We shouldn't place too many. We have to do them one by one.

subtitles.original: Okay, it's all... It's all sold. Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay, it's all... It's all sold. Okay.

subtitles.original: The farmers are panic-selling now. They know, they know. The nerf is coming.
subtitles.english: The farmers are panic-selling now. They know, they know. The nerf is coming.

subtitles.original: Okay, yay! I'll deposit a little more.
subtitles.english: Okay, yay! I'll deposit a little more.

subtitles.original: Three minutes. That's like... one round of suika. Let's go!
subtitles.english: Three minutes. That's like... one round of suika. Let's go!

subtitles.original: Do not forget the Farmer's Day. June...
subtitles.english: Do not forget the Farmer's Day. June...

subtitles.original: Don't panic, don't panic. You have plenty of time. Okay.
subtitles.english: Don't panic, don't panic. You have plenty of time. Okay.

subtitles.original: All right. I think I shall get off for today. For now.
subtitles.english: All right. I think I shall get off for today. For now.

subtitles.original: So, thank you very much for coming to watch the stream today.
subtitles.english: So, thank you very much for coming to watch the stream today.

subtitles.original: Um, hope you guys have a wonderful rest of your morning, afternoon, evening.
subtitles.english: Um, hope you guys have a wonderful rest of your morning, afternoon, evening.

subtitles.original: I'll try to be on time tomorrow, but not 100% sure, so...
subtitles.english: I'll try to be on time tomorrow, but not 100% sure, so...

subtitles.original: will let you guys know. Tomorrow is our last day. Hopefully, we make it to our desired amount of money.
subtitles.english: will let you guys know. Tomorrow is our last day. Hopefully, we make it to our desired amount of money.

subtitles.original: I pray. It won't be too bad.
subtitles.english: I pray. It won't be too bad.

subtitles.original: Anyways, thank you! Until next time, take care! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Anyways, thank you! Until next time, take care! Bye-bye!
